auth.tagline: Track what you watch. Discover what's next.
auth.legalHint: By continuing you agree to our terms.

errors.invalid_input: Invalid input. Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.weak_password: Password is too weak. Use at least 10 characters and mix three of: lowercase, uppercase, digit, symbol.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.request_failed: Something went wrong, please try again.

prefs.regionHint: Used for watch providers and the calendar

filters.title: Filters
filters.minRatingHint: TMDB-based. IMDB rating shows on cards and the detail page.
filters.platformRegionHint: Region: {{region}} — change it from the header.
filters.topHintMovie: Filter within TMDB's 250 highest-rated movies. Cards show streaming platforms.
filters.topHintTv: Filter within TMDB's 250 highest-rated TV shows. Cards show streaming platforms.

movie.addToListSignInHint: Sign in to add to a list
movie.noProviderForRegion: No streaming info for this region.

personalNote.markFirst: Mark this as watched first, then rate and add notes here.

watched.empty: You haven't marked any movies as watched yet.

watchlist.empty: Your watchlist is empty. Use "+ Add to watchlist" on a detail page.

addToList.emptyMessage: You don't have any lists yet.

savedFilters.namePlaceholder: e.g. Long Korean movies on Netflix

tv.signInToTrack: Sign in to mark episodes as watched.
tv.confirmRemoveSeason: Remove all watch records for season {{n}}?

import.title: Import / Export
import.subtitle: Pull data in via Letterboxd CSVs, Trakt OAuth, or Plex/Jellyfin scrobbler; download a JSON dump or Letterboxd CSV from the bottom.
import.signInPrompt: Sign in to import your data
import.letterboxdWatchedDesc: A flat list of your watched movies. Stored only as 'watched' marks.
import.letterboxdDiaryDesc: Dated viewings. Each row is marked as watched. Per-viewing dates and ratings are not preserved.

trakt.sectionDesc: Connect your Trakt account via OAuth and import your watch history directly. Trakt entries carry TMDB IDs — unlike Letterboxd CSVs, matching is exact.
trakt.notConfigured: Trakt integration is not configured on this server. Ask the admin to set TRAKT_CLIENT_ID, TRAKT_CLIENT_SECRET and TRAKT_REDIRECT_URI.
trakt.connectIntro: Once your Trakt account is connected you can import your watch history. Each title is marked as watched (rewatches are not preserved). Trakt entries already carry TMDB IDs, so matching is exact.

webhooks.intro: Paste the URL below into your Plex or Jellyfin webhook settings. On each trigger we extract the TMDB ID from the scrobble payload and mark the title as watched. Plex only needs media.scrobble; Jellyfin's Webhook plugin should send PlaybackStop / UserDataSaved / MarkPlayed.
webhooks.label: Label
webhooks.freshWarn: ⚠ This URL is shown only now — copy it and paste it into Plex/Jellyfin.
webhooks.confirmDelete: Delete the token "{{label}}"? This can't be undone.
webhooks.empty: You don't have any webhook tokens yet.

exports.intro: Download your data any time. The JSON dump contains every record (watched, watchlist, viewing list, episodes, custom lists). The Letterboxd CSV lets you move to another platform.
exports.note: For security, the JSON dump deliberately excludes any secrets (Trakt tokens, webhook tokens) — it's a 'this is my data' download, not a credential backup. The Letterboxd CSV carries date / title / rating; the year column is empty (not stored), Letterboxd matches by title.
